_note: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for the Zodiac colour system. Locked 2026-06-30. Verified by Google Material + Adobe Leonardo. The app and every artifact must match this exactly; run code/check_app_against_tokens.py before calling anything done. IN-APP NEUTRAL TREATMENT (LOCKED by Michael 2026-07-01, three surfaces, do NOT collapse): Cream #F6F1E8 = screen canvas/ground (the darker, warmer cream); MoonDust #FBF8F3 = the TILE-SQUARE face only (the lighter, brighter cream, behind each frequency cymatic); Bleach #FFFFFF = cards/song rows. Toggle track = greige #EAE4DA + white active thumb. (Rejected: uniform-light and uniform-dark — #F6F1E8 on a tile reads grey; #FBF8F3 across the whole canvas washes out.) Accent = Core Purple #6521C9 EVERYWHERE (in-app + marketing), ratified 2026-07-01, no surface split, Celestial Blue retired.

functional.use: buttons, cards, active states, controls (scrubber). ~90% of UI.

frequency.use: tiles, now-playing wave, the active-frequency identity ONLY.

brand.use: hero, loading, app icon, marketing. NOT inside app UI.

component_gradient_rules.play_buttons: app-A (was app-new)=solid Control #2A2530; app-B (was app-calm)=outline ControlOutline #868491 (mauve-grey, palette-tuned). Comparing the two. Both use the framed 'frequency disc' tiles.
component_gradient_rules.text_accent: use frequency.accent for labels/active tab TEXT (legible; Vitality is burnt-orange #C25500 not the gold-brown deep). Vibrant primary/gradient only on solid dots/blobs/tiles.
component_gradient_rules.logo: HARD RULE: always use the real zodiac.fm wordmark asset (app-assets/logo-black.svg on light, logo-cream.svg on dark). NEVER fake, re-typeset, recreate, or modify it — colour is the ONLY allowed change. Monochrome; does not tint to the frequency.
component_gradient_rules.frequency_toggle: segmented control: neutral track #EAE4DA, white active thumb + soft shadow, active label in frequency accent. Not bubbly pills.

distribution: 60% neutral canvas / 30% Core Purple structure / 10% frequency accents. Light mode default; dark mode supported. Frequencies are accents, never floods (except the now-playing visualiser).

dark_mode.status: DEFERRED — light mode is default and shipped; build dark mode later.
dark_mode.canvas: Stage #0B0712 (or #0F0B16 purple-black); cards one step lighter (#1B1622); text/ink flips light (#ECE7F2).
rules: Re-check EVERY pairing in dark, do not just invert (run the contrast checks again).
Outline play button: ring -> #92909E (5.66 on dark card), triangle -> #BEBCCA (9.49). The light-mode triangle #63616F is only 2.93 on dark and must NOT be reused.
Frequency accents, tiles, and the now-playing wave stay as-is (they read on dark already).
Neutral play button (app-new): the #2A2530 fill is invisible on dark — flip to a light neutral there too.

interactions.reorder: Whole card is draggable on click-and-hold (long-press) anywhere on it — not just the grip. Grip dots + "drag to reorder" hint are the visual cue only. Immersions + Favourites.
interactions.play: Tap anywhere on the card = play/pause.
